detaileddescription.para: This file contains the main implementation of the Xilinx HDCP 2.2 Receiver device driver. MODIFICATION HISTORY:

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 JB 02/19/19 First Release. 3.00 JB 12/24/21 File name changed from xhdcp22_rx.c to xhdcp22_rx_dp.c, Also all the APIs and structure names are added with suffix _dp.
